title: miconia cornuta
intro: Miconia cornuta is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "Mountain Gold" or "Yellow Bird's Head" due to its bright yellow flowers resembling a bird's head. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Miconia cornuta include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a range of ailments.
